name: statik-skills
description: A collection of skills that extend Claude's capabilities for specialized tasks

skills.name: dns-troubleshooter
skills.description: Diagnose and troubleshoot DNS issues including delegation verification, record conflicts, authoritative vs local DNS comparison, and SPF validation

skills.name: design-memo
skills.description: Produce polished, self-contained HTML design memos with Tufte-inspired editorial layout and scrollytelling interaction for any plan, design, or architecture proposal
